# ML-DSA-65 keyGen known-answer tests
#
# Source: NIST ACVP-Server (https://github.com/usnistgov/ACVP-Server),
#         file gen-val/json-files/ML-DSA-keyGen-FIPS204/internalProjection.json,
#         filtered to parameterSet = ML-DSA-65, first 5 vectors.
#
# Tested by: crates/adamant-crypto/src/sig_pq.rs ::tests::nist_acvp_key_gen_kats
#
# Each vector: a 32-byte seed, the expected 1952-byte ML-DSA-65 public key.
# We exercise the public key derivation only; the expanded signing key (sk in the
# upstream JSON) is omitted because our public API is seed-based and the expanded
# form is not part of the wrapper surface.
#
# Format: blocks separated by blank lines.
#   tcId = <upstream test-case id; for cross-reference into the ACVP file>
#   Seed = <32-byte seed in hex>
#   PK   = <expected 1952-byte verifying key in hex>

[ParameterSet = ML-DSA-65]
